LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CERTAIN UNDERWRITERS AT LLOYD'S AND OSPREY UNDERWRITING AGENCY,LTD'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO DISMISS OR STAY ACTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT CONTENDS THAT PLAINTIFF FAILS TO STATE A VALID CLAIM FOR EQUITABLE CONTRIBUTION OR EQUITABLE INDEMNITY. WHETHER PLAINTIFF FAILS TO STATE VALID CLAIMS IS NOT THE PROPER BASIS FOR A MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Dismiss Or Stay Action
Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Binion of Carroll, Burdick & McDonough LLP telephone number 415-743-2421 for Plaintiff Liberty Northwest Insurance Company.
John Burnite or Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP telephone number 415-433-0990 for Defendants Certain Underwriters at Lloyd's and Opsrey Underwriting Agency.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court modified its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CERTAIN UNDERWRITERS AT LLOYD'S AND OSPREY UNDERWRITING AGENCY,LTD'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Dismiss Or Stay Action is denied without prejudice. Defendant contends that Plaintiff fails to state a valid claim for equitable contribution or equitable indemnity. Whether Plaintiff fails to state valid claims is not the proper basis for a motion to compel arbitration. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
